OFFICIAL PROMO

The largest Afro-Caribbean-Hip Hop festival, returning to the DMV bigger than ever. Three days · multiple stages · one continuous celebration of the culture. From Friday gates to Sunday's closing set — Afrobeats, amapiano, dancehall, and hip hop, all on one ground.

01 / TONIGHT'S BILL

THE POSTER

Three days. Stadium-size. The full lineup. Pin it, screenshot it, send it to the group chat.

THE
LARGEST.
EVER.

From one day at RFK to three days at Northwest Stadium. The DMV's loudest weekend of the year just got 3x bigger. Headliners, hidden gems, food, vendors, the whole village.
